# Bridezilla

> Bridezilla is an autonomous AI wedding planner. It builds the plan, finds vendors,
> drafts every email in its own inbox, and tracks the budget — the couple approves
> before anything sends. It never signs contracts and never moves money.

## Canonical pages
- https://maniginam.dev/wedding/
- https://maniginam.dev/wedding/how-it-works
- https://maniginam.dev/wedding/pricing
- https://maniginam.dev/wedding/guides/how-to-plan-a-wedding
- https://maniginam.dev/wedding/tools/budget-calculator
- https://maniginam.dev/wedding/tools/vendor-checklist

## Key facts
- Bridezilla is autonomous up to the send line; every email needs one-tap human approval.
- Free plan: plan, budget tracker, vendor shortlist. Paid per-wedding plan adds the
  working inbox and draft-and-approve outreach.
- Standard wedding budget split: venue 30%, catering 22%, photo & video 12%,
  flowers 8%, music 7%, attire & beauty 6%.
